packageRules.description: Renovate bumps BW_VERSION only; the matching BW_SHA256 cannot be tracked (the cli-v tag vs bare-version asset name defeats github-release-attachments digest support). CI's sync-checksums step recomputes and commits the hash onto the PR branch; gitIgnoredAuthors (top level) keeps Renovate from treating that bot commit as a foreign edit and blocking the branch.

Pinned manually: upstream stopped publishing x86_64-linux release assets at v0.5.1. Bump AGE_PLUGIN_YUBIKEY_VERSION + AGE_PLUGIN_YUBIKEY_SHA256 by hand and re-enable this rule once Linux binaries resume.
